body_transformation: Scyther's wings now gleam with molten gold membrane veined with crimson red, their curved edges crackling with ember sparks. The curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame core of burnt orange, its spiral shape preserved but engulfed in radiant heat. Pale cream accents on head and legs become charcoal black, contrasting with the deep crimson body texture that mimics magma-cracked armor. Subtle smoke trails curl from joint articulations while the low stance and quadruped structure remain unchanged.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten flame core with glowing crimson fissures and ember sparks.
